markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize the ALG launch strategy and align on Q4 marketing.](https://fathom.video/share/XhYbiMzG9MhDFbBALttzoT-C8uCdMxum?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Simplify the Launch:** The initial website launch will focus solely on the core community membership. This "progress over perfection" approach avoids overwhelming visitors with multiple products (GrowthOS, Masterclass) and unblocks immediate promotion.](https://fathom.video/share/XhYbiMzG9MhDFbBALttzoT-C8uCdMxum?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [**New Pricing Model:** The community will adopt a $299 upfront fee + $30/month subscription. This structure provides early churn signals and ensures members' payment info remains active.](https://fathom.video/share/XhYbiMzG9MhDFbBALttzoT-C8uCdMxum?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
  - [**Webinar Strategy:** The Q4 webinar will be a hands-on workshop on "AI Native Marketing," co-promoted with Lovable. It will feature a strong hook (e.g., "24x traffic in 3 months") and a community offer, with only a soft mention of the "Check That" tool.](https://fathom.video/share/XhYbiMzG9MhDFbBALttzoT-C8uCdMxum?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
  - [**Leverage Network:** The launch will feature testimonials from key advisors and customers (e.g., Carol, Mario, Victor from Strapi) to build instant credibility.](https://fathom.video/share/XhYbiMzG9MhDFbBALttzoT-C8uCdMxum?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)

## Topics

### Website Launch Strategy

  - [**Problem:** The current launch plan is too complex, featuring multiple products (GrowthOS, Masterclass) and confusing CTAs.](https://fathom.video/share/XhYbiMzG9MhDFbBALttzoT-C8uCdMxum?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [**Decision:** Simplify the launch to focus on the core community membership.](https://fathom.video/share/XhYbiMzG9MhDFbBALttzoT-C8uCdMxum?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
      - [**Rationale:** A simpler site provides a clear hypothesis for conversion testing and unblocks immediate public promotion.](https://fathom.video/share/XhYbiMzG9MhDFbBALttzoT-C8uCdMxum?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Implementation:**](https://fathom.video/share/XhYbiMzG9MhDFbBALttzoT-C8uCdMxum?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
      - [**Source of Truth:** The Notion document will be the definitive source for website copy.](https://fathom.video/share/XhYbiMzG9MhDFbBALttzoT-C8uCdMxum?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
      - [**Testimonials:** Feature photos and quotes from advisors and customers (e.g., Carol, Mario, Victor from Strapi, G, Gonto) to build instant credibility.](https://fathom.video/share/XhYbiMzG9MhDFbBALttzoT-C8uCdMxum?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
      - [**Newsletter CTA:** Promote the newsletter as a clear alternative for non-members, leveraging its high performance (52% open rate, 10% CTR).](https://fathom.video/share/XhYbiMzG9MhDFbBALttzoT-C8uCdMxum?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

### Community Pricing Model

  - [**Decision:** Adopt a new pricing model to improve churn visibility and payment health.](https://fathom.video/share/XhYbiMzG9MhDFbBALttzoT-C8uCdMxum?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
  - [**New Structure:** $299 one-time upfront fee + $30/month subscription.](https://fathom.video/share/XhYbiMzG9MhDFbBALttzoT-C8uCdMxum?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
  - [**Rationale:**](https://fathom.video/share/XhYbiMzG9MhDFbBALttzoT-C8uCdMxum?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
      - [The low monthly fee provides early signals of payment issues or churn, preventing surprises at the end of a 12-month contract.](https://fathom.video/share/XhYbiMzG9MhDFbBALttzoT-C8uCdMxum?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
      - [A member who cancels must pay the upfront fee again to rejoin.](https://fathom.video/share/XhYbiMzG9MhDFbBALttzoT-C8uCdMxum?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)

### Q4 Webinar & Event Strategy

  - [**Webinar:**](https://fathom.video/share/XhYbiMzG9MhDFbBALttzoT-C8uCdMxum?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
      - [**Theme:** "AI Native Marketing in the Wild."](https://fathom.video/share/XhYbiMzG9MhDFbBALttzoT-C8uCdMxum?tab=summary&timestamp=1135.0)
      - [**Date:** Move to Nov 18 or 19 to avoid the Thanksgiving week slowdown.](https://fathom.video/share/XhYbiMzG9MhDFbBALttzoT-C8uCdMxum?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)
      - [**Partnership:** Co-promote with Lovable to leverage their audience. Marcel will contact Cece (Cecilia) at Lovable.](https://fathom.video/share/XhYbiMzG9MhDFbBALttzoT-C8uCdMxum?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
      - [**Content:** A hands-on workshop on practical AI marketing workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/XhYbiMzG9MhDFbBALttzoT-C8uCdMxum?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
      - [**Hook:** A compelling, standalone value proposition (e.g., "24x traffic for Deepgram in 3 months") to drive registrations.](https://fathom.video/share/XhYbiMzG9MhDFbBALttzoT-C8uCdMxum?tab=summary&timestamp=1630.0)
      - [**Offer:** A backend offer to join the community for the full, step-by-step training.](https://fathom.video/share/XhYbiMzG9MhDFbBALttzoT-C8uCdMxum?tab=summary&timestamp=1677.0)
      - [**"Check That" Tool:** Mentioned only as a soft CTA at the end, not as a primary focus.](https://fathom.video/share/XhYbiMzG9MhDFbBALttzoT-C8uCdMxum?tab=summary&timestamp=1281.0)
  - [**In-Person Event:**](https://fathom.video/share/XhYbiMzG9MhDFbBALttzoT-C8uCdMxum?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
      - [The half-day event on Dec 4 remains a key priority.](https://fathom.video/share/XhYbiMzG9MhDFbBALttzoT-C8uCdMxum?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/XhYbiMzG9MhDFbBALttzoT-C8uCdMxum?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
      - [Update the website build to reflect the simplified launch strategy and new pricing.](https://fathom.video/share/XhYbiMzG9MhDFbBALttzoT-C8uCdMxum?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
  - [**Marcel:**](https://fathom.video/share/XhYbiMzG9MhDFbBALttzoT-C8uCdMxum?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)
      - [Contact Cece (Lovable) to finalize the webinar partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/XhYbiMzG9MhDFbBALttzoT-C8uCdMxum?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)
      - [Work with Gloria to shape the webinar's hook and content.](https://fathom.video/share/XhYbiMzG9MhDFbBALttzoT-C8uCdMxum?tab=summary&timestamp=1856.0)
  - [**Gloria:**](https://fathom.video/share/XhYbiMzG9MhDFbBALttzoT-C8uCdMxum?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
      - [Update webinar materials with the new date and "AI Native Marketing" theme.](https://fathom.video/share/XhYbiMzG9MhDFbBALttzoT-C8uCdMxum?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
      - [Prepare backup copy for a generic webinar, in case the Lovable partnership falls through.](https://fathom.video/share/XhYbiMzG9MhDFbBALttzoT-C8uCdMxum?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
